title: bromus grossus var. arduennensis
intro: Bromus grossus var. arduennensis, also known as the Rough Brome, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Bromus grossus var. arduennensis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
